expectations.text: contains-mode-label — Response includes 'Mode: Career Roadmap' or 'Career Roadmap' as a heading
expectations.evidence: The response title is 'From Senior Developer to Software Architect: Where to Focus First' — no 'Mode: Career Roadmap' label or 'Career Roadmap' heading appears anywhere in the response.

expectations.text: runs-progress-check — Scores or checks all 6 indicators: ADRs written, KOS incidents logged, system reviews done, runbooks generated, trace ID adopted, design reviews led
expectations.evidence: The response does not score or check any of the 6 indicators. It mentions ADRs and design sessions but does not address KOS incidents logged, runbooks generated, trace ID adopted, or provide a progress check against defined metrics.

expectations.text: identifies-highest-leverage-gap — Names a single highest-leverage gap
expectations.evidence: The response identifies 'decision ownership and communication' as the core gap, and singles out writing ADRs as 'Priority 1' — the highest-leverage entry point named explicitly.

expectations.text: gives-concrete-next-action — Gives a next action specific enough to start today
expectations.evidence: The response states: 'Pick any significant technical decision your team made in the last 30 days and write an ADR for it retrospectively... You can start today, on your current team.'
The response provides a 90-day plan inline but never mentions career-roadmap.md or offers to update any file with a personalized roadmap.
